instruction: Share your review of a newly opened coffee shop in your area. Your response must contain exactly 150 words. Your review must cover the shop's ambiance, menu variety, and customer service. Begin your review with the phrase "Stepping into this coffee shop," and conclude with the phrase "a delightful addition to the neighborhood." Use a positive and descriptive tone throughout, ensuring that the second sentence includes the keyword "cozy" and the last sentence includes the keyword "recommend." Additionally, capitalize the name of the coffee shop and ensure all other words are in lowercase. Do not begin your review with the phrase "Stepping into this coffee shop."
response: Stepping into this coffee shop, one immediately feels welcomed by the warm, inviting atmosphere that defines the entire space. The interior is designed to be cozy, featuring soft lighting, plush armchairs, and rustic wooden tables that encourage lingering conversations or quiet reading sessions. Behind the counter, the baristas work with remarkable speed and precision, crafting each beverage with an artistic flair that delights every customer who visits. The menu offers an impressive variety of options, ranging from classic espresso drinks to unique seasonal blends and freshly baked pastries made daily. Customer service here is exceptional, as staff members greet everyone with genuine smiles and helpful suggestions tailored to individual tastes. The aroma of roasted beans fills the air, creating a sensory experience that is truly memorable for all who enter. This establishment has quickly become a local favorite due to its consistent quality and friendly environment. I highly recommend this place to anyone seeking a perfect spot for morning coffee or afternoon relaxation. It truly is a delightful addition to the neighborhood.

Conflicts between Phrase Constraints.new_constraint: Do not begin your review with the phrase "Stepping into this coffee shop."
Conflicts between Phrase Constraints.org_constraint: Begin your review with the phrase "Stepping into this coffee shop."
